Overview  Package  Class   Use  Tree  Deprecated  Index  Help 
 PREV   NEXT FRAMES    NO FRAMES    

Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.EventType

Packages that use EventType
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.join An application joins media objects to establish media streams between them. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource This package provides the base definitions for managing media processing resources. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video Capabilites to handle video resources, layout and rendering. 
javax.media.mscontrol.vxml Capabilities to control VoiceXML dialogs that are delegated to the Media Server. 
 

Uses of EventType in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that return EventType
 EventType MediaEvent.getEventType()
          Get the EventType that identifies the event nature.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that return types with arguments of type EventType
 java.util.Set<EventType> SupportedFeatures.getSupportedEventTypes()
          Provide the Set of supported EventTypes.
 

Uses of EventType in javax.media.mscontrol.join
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.join declared as EventType
static EventType JoinEvent.JOINED
          This EventType is returned by getEventType() to signal the completion of a join operation.
static EventType JoinEvent.UNJOINED
          This EventType is returned by getEventType() to signal the completion of an unjoin operation.
 

Uses of EventType in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup declared as EventType
static EventType PlayerEvent.PAUSED
          Play has been paused by RTC.
static EventType RecorderEvent.PAUSED
          Indicates that recording has been paused.
static EventType PlayerEvent.PLAY_COMPLETED
          Completion event for the play method.
static EventType RecorderEvent.RECORD_COMPLETED
          Indicates that recording has been completed.
static EventType PlayerEvent.RESUMED
          Play has been resumed by RTC.
static EventType RecorderEvent.RESUMED
          Indicates that recording has been resumed.
static EventType PlayerEvent.SPEED_CHANGED
          Playback speed has been changed due to RTC.
static EventType RecorderEvent.STARTED
          Indicates that the recording has started.
static EventType PlayerEvent.VOLUME_CHANGED
          Playback volume has been changed due to RTC.
 

Uses of EventType in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals declared as EventType
static EventType SignalGeneratorEvent.EMIT_SIGNALS_COMPLETED
          Completion event from emitSignals()
static EventType SignalDetectorEvent.FLUSH_BUFFER_COMPLETED
          FlushBuffer completion event.
static EventType SignalDetectorEvent.OVERFLOWED
          The SignalDetector signal buffer has overflowed.
static EventType[] SignalDetectorEvent.PATTERN_MATCHED
          Array of pattern EventType's, indicating a pattern matched event.
static EventType SignalDetectorEvent.RECEIVE_SIGNALS_COMPLETED
          Completion event for receiveSignals.
static EventType SignalDetectorEvent.SIGNAL_DETECTED
          A single Signal has been detected.
 

Uses of EventType in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer declared as EventType
static EventType MixerEvent.ACTIVE_INPUTS_CHANGED
          The event indicates that the list of ActiveInputs has changed.
static EventType MixerEvent.MOST_ACTIVE_INPUT_CHANGED
          The event indicates that the most ActiveInput has changed.
 

Uses of EventType in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection declared as EventType
static EventType SdpPortManagerEvent.ANSWER_GENERATED
          EventType sent by a SdpPortManager when SdpPortManager.processSdpOffer(byte[]) has completed.
static EventType SdpPortManagerEvent.ANSWER_PROCESSED
          EventType sent by a SdpPortManager when SdpPortManager.processSdpAnswer(byte[]) has completed.
static EventType SdpPortManagerEvent.NETWORK_STREAM_FAILURE
          Event sent by the media server to indicate a hard failure on a media stream.
static EventType SdpPortManagerEvent.OFFER_GENERATED
          EventType sent by a SdpPortManager when SdpPortManager.generateSdpOffer() has completed.
static EventType SdpPortManagerEvent.UNSOLICITED_OFFER_GENERATED
          Event sent by the media server to indicate that it requests a change in the local SDP.
 

Uses of EventType in javax.media.mscontrol.resource
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.resource declared as EventType
static EventType AllocationEvent.ALLOCATION_CONFIRMED
          This EventType is returned by getEventType() to signal the completion of a ResourceContainer.confirm().
static EventType AllocationEvent.IRRECOVERABLE_FAILURE
          Indicates that an irrecoverable failure occurred, like the loss of connectivity to the media server.
 

Uses of EventType in javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video declared as EventType
static EventType VideoRendererEvent.RENDERING_COMPLETED
          EventType of the VideoRendererEvent that is sent when the rendering of all discrete or continuous media is complete.
 

Uses of EventType in javax.media.mscontrol.vxml
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.vxml declared as EventType
static EventType VxmlDialogEvent.DISCONNECTION_REQUESTED
          Event sent by the vxml interpreter to request to be disconnected.
static EventType VxmlDialogEvent.ERROR_EVENT
          This event is thrown when a dialog request cannot be completed (wrong internal state, ...).
static EventType VxmlDialogEvent.EXITED
          Event sent by the vxml interpreter, as a result of executing the <exit> element.
static EventType VxmlDialogEvent.MIDCALL_EVENT_RECEIVED
          Event sent by the vxml interpreter when a mid-call event arises.
static EventType VxmlDialogEvent.PREPARED
          Event sent by the vxml interpreter to signal the completion of a VxmlDialog.prepare(java.net.URL, javax.media.mscontrol.Parameters, java.util.Map) request.
static EventType VxmlDialogEvent.STARTED
          Event sent by the vxml interpreter to signal the completion of a VxmlDialog.start(java.util.Map) request.
